Entry.Comment: 1: Value smaller than Limit1 2: Value greater than Limit1 3: Value equal Limit1

Entry.Comment: 1: Value smaller than Limit2 2: Value greater than Limit2 3: Value equal Limit2

Entry.Name: Status__Error
Entry.Comment: Data invalid

Entry.Name: Status__Steady State
Entry.Comment: Measurement is stable

Entry.Name: Status__Tare Active
Entry.Comment: 0: no tare, tare in progress starts with falling edge 1: tare valid

Entry.Name: Status__Warning
Entry.Comment: The bit is set when the warning thresholds configured through CoE are exceeded
